---
title: "About"
image: /images/wing_icon.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/obssxed-cell
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:unsettlement@pm.me
---

## About me

Pharmacology student, working toward 
computational biology / bioinformatics with a longer-term interest 
in computational neuroscience. I learn best by building things, I wanted to document my journey.

## What I'm working on

- Molecular docking pipeline (AutoDock Vina, HADDOCK) for a 
  neuroscience-adjacent research project. See the Lab Notebook for 
  process notes (results/findings are kept off this site)
- RNA-seq analysis, variant calling, and NGS workflows
- Building reproducible, documented pipelines

## Skills

**Computational**: Python, Galaxy, conda environments  
**Bioinformatics tools**: AutoDock Vina, PDB2PQR, OpenBabel, Meeko, 
PyMOL, HADDOCK  
**In progress**: RNA-seq pipelines, variant calling, scientific 
programming  

## Education

**MSci Pharmacology**, graduation eventually d:

**Incoming:** PhD in computational neuroscience or genomic medicine

::: {.pixel-bar-frame style="--bar-v:url('/images/border_pink_vertical.png'); --bar-h:url('/images/border_pink_horizontal.png');"}


## Outside the lab

Digital design and pixel art — most of the visual design on this site 
(illustrations, icons, layout touches) is my own work.

Oil painting — I enjoy relaxing while inhaling fumes, it does good for my mind

By the way, I will also be making many different stained glass pieces in gothic / victorian style.
Including, but not limited to:

- mirror frames
- lampshades
- figures

I will update it here soon and I will link my etsy and showcase account here soon, so if you are interested, stay tuned !

![](/images/wing_icon.png){width=100px .pixel-art}

:::
